label: Do inversions affect meiosis per chromosome?
description: Compare meiotic recombination rates between karyotype groups within and outside inversion intervals, per chromosome. The manuscript pair-relation target (LG01 x LG28).

requires.role: assign carriers to homA / het / homB per inversion
define extended inheritance blocks around inversions
count recombination / transmission events per chromosome

label: Mendelian QC of the LG28 inversion candidate
description: Manuscript path A: per-trio Mendelian-error rate inside inv_LG28_INV_001, conditioned on karyotype groups.

requires.role: karyotype groups for the LG28 candidate

label: Popstats between karyotype groups inside the LG28 candidate
description: Manuscript path B: per-candidate windowed FST / dxy / piN / piS between karyotype groups inside inv_LG28_INV_001.

requires.role: karyotype groups for the LG28 candidate

label: Do LG01 and LG28 inversions show joint genotype distortion?
description: Manuscript stress-test target: the two candidate inversions on chr1 and chr28 are hypothesised to co-segregate or repel; this question tests whether the 3x3 joint karyotype table deviates from independent expectations.

requires.role: the actual joint distortion test result

outputs.grain: candidate_a x candidate_b x 3x3 karyotype cells

label: Do focal inversion heterozygotes show altered CO/DCO/C on other chromosomes?
description: For each focal inversion, test whether heterozygous parents show altered crossover rate, double-crossover rate, or coefficient of coincidence (C) on chromosomes OTHER than the inversion's. Family-aware permutation; local inversion covariates.

requires.role: het / non-het classification on focal inversions
CO events per dyad per tested chromosome
